name: Every.ai
description: Agent-native platform that provides agents with programmatic access to booking, scheduling, CRM, billing, and client management. Includes email agent (agent@every.ai), MCP server for agent integration, and AI business profile for agent discovery. Purpose-built for agent-to-business interactions.
capabilities: Book services and schedule meetings programmatically
Send and receive emails as agent@every.ai
notes: Positioned as a replacement for multiple business tools (CRM, invoicing, scheduling). Email agent is a unique capability for autonomous agent operation. MCP server enables integration with any MCP-compatible AI system.
